name: Gem Smash
author: Poki
description: Gem Smash is a skill game where you have to smash all the gems as quickly as possible. If you smash enough gems, you'll face a gem boss! There are multiple levels to complete. Can you smash all the gems? Controls: Smash - mouse click About the creator: Gem Smash was created by KasSanity. He is known for games like Twirl , Cube Wave and many more titles that are all playable on Poki !
